subcodes.first_line: O people of S! The sorrows that have descended are even as the showers of rain. I swear by the Most Exalted Word and by the pearls of the ocean of the Lord of all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل س احزان وارده بمثابه امطار نازل قسم بکلمه علیا و لئالی بحر مولی الوری
